metadata.title: YourSign — decentralized signing
metadata.description: Sign documents with your Solana wallet. On-chain verifiable. No server in the path.

home.eyebrow: Cryptographic signature · Zero cost · Agents under control
home.h1Lead: Upload your contract and sign it
home.subtitle: Solana public key, SHA-256 hash anchored on-chain, no gas fees. And delegate tasks to an AI agent with scope and expiry — all revocable on-chain.

step1.title: Drop the PDF, we read it.
step1.body: OCR auto-detects where the signature, initials and date should go. Adjust by dragging blocks.

step2.title: Connect a wallet or sign in with email.
step2.body: Phantom, Backpack, Solflare — or social login that creates an invisible wallet. You never have to see a seed phrase.

step3.title: Approve an off-chain message.
step3.body: YourSign generates a SHA-256 hash of the content, you sign it with your Solana key, and the proof is anchored immutably on-chain via Light Protocol.

footer.right: Legal validity · Public audit · ICP-Brasil optional

dropzone.headline: Drop your PDF here or click to select
dropzone.subline: PDFs up to 25 MB · End-to-end privacy
dropzone.cta: Drop the file or click here

metadata.title: YourSign — delegate to an agent
metadata.description: Authorize an AI agent with on-chain scope. Revocable any time.

agents.subtitle: You will sign a canonical message authorizing the agent. The delegation is registered on-chain and can be revoked at any time.

form.connectFirst: Connect a wallet to sign the delegation.

scopePreview.revokeNote: You can revoke this permission at any time. Revocation is recorded on-chain.
scopePreview.docsHashes: {count, plural, one {# specific doc} other {# specific docs}}

metadata.title: YourSign — anchor PDF on-chain
metadata.description: Anchor a SHA-256 hash on Solana via the register_document instruction.

sign.subtitle: Connect your Solana wallet and sign the transaction. The SHA-256 hash gets anchored on-chain via the {instruction} instruction.

flow.connectPrompt: Connect Phantom, Backpack, Solflare or social login.
flow.privyInitializing: Privy authenticated, but Solana wallet still initializing…
flow.noFunds: Insufficient balance. Need ~0.003 SOL for rent + fee.
flow.faucetSuffix: . Paste the pubkey above and request 1 SOL. Refresh this page after.

scope.documentsHashes: {count, plural, one {# specific doc} other {# specific docs}}
